      How to send and share large files with TransferNow?

      Follow three simple steps to upload and share large documents securely.

      1

      Select your files to send

      Click on Start to select the files and documents to send, or drag and drop them anywhere directly on our interface.

      2

      Fill-in our form

      Send files via email to your contacts or get a customizable shareable link. Our tool provides the adapted features in keeping with your needs.

      3

      Validate to transfer and start upload!

      When you have finished filling-in the file transfer form, click on Transfer to confirm your transfer information and start uploading your documents 🚀

      With a TransferNow account you can send and share even larger files!

      Create a free account to gain more features, tracking tools, and higher transfer caps.

      Secure file transfer

      Send and share files via email or generate links. All communication uses SSL/TLS and stored files are encrypted at rest using AES-256 bits.

      Send up to 250 GB per transfer

      Create a paid plan to send up to 250 GB of data. Files remain available on the servers for up to 365 days before automatic removal.

      Track and manage transfers

      Access your dashboard to check download statistics. Delete transfers before they expire, or extend their lifetime with a single click.

      Add team collaborators

      Easily import team members. Define explicit administrative rights, white-label subdomains, custom styles, and consolidated group invoices.

      Integrate a file widget

      Use our generator to build file-reception widgets. Paste a simple line of HTML code to collect files from customers directly on your website.

      Antivirus verification scan

      Rest easy knowing we automatically scan all files for viruses at the end of every transfer before they become accessible to download.

      Add-ins & Extensions for your mailboxes

      Outlook Add-in

      Integrate TransferNow inside Microsoft Outlook. Upload heavy attachments effortlessly and embed download links directly into your emails.

      Discover Outlook Add-in

      Chrome & Gmail Extension

      Send large files right from Google Chrome and Gmail. Perfect, lightweight integration to elevate your file sharing efficiency.

      Discover Chrome Extension

      TransferNow clone is a complete simulation of a modern large-file transfer platform, showing high-end styling and fully detailed flows.
